raw_payload.subject: Worth a quick intro?
raw_payload.body:
Sam,

I have heard good things about IFG from a few folks in the market. I spend a lot of time with blue-collar founders and figured it would be good for us to know each other.

Would you be open to a quick intro call?

Caleb
raw_payload.thread_summary: Referral-adjacent wealth advisor asking for a generic intro. No named owner, industry, or immediate opportunity.
